titleStmt.title: SII 10.226: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 226. (A.R. No. 447 of 1905.) ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE TEMPLE OF VIJAYARĀGHAVA PERUMĀḶ, TIRUTTANI, CHITTORE DISTRICT. Year not given

summary.p: States that one Nārāyaṇarāja of the Karikāla-Chōḍa family built the temple of god Vīrarāghava.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yasmā dviśva midaṁ carācara mabhū tsṛṣṭyādikālē tata tsṛṣṭiṁ pālita madhyayēna vilayē yasmin puna¨rnaṁkṣyati tasmā daṁbujalōcanā dudabhadbraṁhmā tataḥ kāśyapaḥ
tasmā daṁbuja tasmācca saṁjajñirē . yikṣvākupramukhā statō daśaratha śrīrāmacaṁdrādaya(ḥ) stadvaṁśē bahavō babhūvu ramalāḥ prakhyātavīrā statō karikālacōḍanṛpa
tiḥ khyātōtranāmnā kalau tatputrōjani cakrava¨rttibhi ta śrīvēṁkaṭēśapriyaḥ . 2 . tasmā tsudhāmā rucira statōbhūt tasyāpi nārāyaṇanāmarājaḥ . sōyaṁ svanā mnā mahitē cirāya nā¨rya
nagarē samiṁthē . 3 . sasōmavaṁśāya hītalē jayāya . sudhā nāmmi vitīryarājyā¨rthamathānyada¨rthaṁ kuśasthaladakṣiṇatōnubhuṁjē . 4 . tēnākāri purī surēndranagarāhaṁkāradhikkāriṇī vāsāyakṣaṇi
kābhidhānagirirāṭpratyaṁtadēśē tataḥ . yatrāntē satataṁ ṣaḍa¨rdhanayanaprēmapramāṇībhavan sēnānī surasēnayā saha paraṁ valyāca gēhē mudā . 5 . Atrāvasan vīrarāghavamē virājā saṁsthāpya sālē
taśca vidhāya sāraṁ . vīrā ribhitihitō rāvāhya tasya vidadhē gṛhagōpurādīn . 6 .
Digital edition of SII 10.226 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
